volume.h1: TEXTS OF SOUTH-INDIAN INSCRIPTIONS VOL. VIII

inscription.head:
No. 1.
(A.R. No. 416 of 1902).
ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE TIRUKKALISVARA TEMPLE AT
VEPPANGULAM NEAR CONJEEVERAM, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

l.ta:
tirumātu puviyeṉṉum perumāta riruvar teviya[r]āka mitiṭai veṇkuṭai yuyart-

inscription.head:
No. 3.
(A.R. No. 417 of 1902).
ON THE SOUTH, WEST AND NORTH WALLS OF THE SAME SHRINE.

l.ta:
tiṅkaḷertaru taṉ ṟo[ṅkal] veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaṭ
puṇar

tu maṉṉu pa[l*]lūḻiyuṭ ṭeṉnavar
muvaruḷ mā[n]āparaṇaṉ poṉmuṭiānāp parumatiṭ pa[cu]

ḷūrccālai kalamaṟuppit
tāhavamallaṉu mañcaṟkevutaṉṟāṅkarum paṭaiyi nāṅkavaṉ ceṉaiyuṭ kaṇ-
[ṭa]ppayaṉug kaṅkātaraṉum vaṇ[ṭa*]mar kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭi[ya]t tiṇṭiṟal virutar

ṭāṟ porutirai uṭutta ilaṅkaiyaṟ kiṟaivaṉ alaṅka[l*] muṭi yari

veḻkaṭa liḻa[m] puk kilaṅkeca-

tūṇiyāka nellu nūṟṟirupatiṉ kalamum ikkoṭṭattuc ciyapuranāṭṭu ciparā

aiyār kaṭava neṟkaṭamaikkuc celavupeṟa iṭakkaṭava
paricārakam ceyyum civa(n)

ṇaṉ oruva[ṉukku] nicata nellup patakkāka
ne[l]lu•••••

edition.l:
mum maṇaiyiṟkoṭṭattu [kkaṇanūrnāṭṭu] miḻalaimaṅkalattu sabh aiyār kaṭava nel-
lukku celavu peṟa iṭakka[ṭa]va pari[c]ārakamceyum civa(n)brahma ṇaṉ [o]ruvaṉukku
nicata nellup patakkāka nellu aṟupatiṉ kalamum ikkoṭṭattup puricaināṭṭu
aparāyitaccaturvvē timaṅkalattu sabh aiyār kaṭava nellukku celavupeṟa iṭak-
•••••• tiṉ kalamumāka ippaṭi āṭṭāṇṭutoṟu
muniṉṟā[rkku] muṟṟi cantrādi ttavaṟ kuṭu[p*]pitākap poliyūṭṭāl kaṭa[va]
nellukke celavupeṟat tiruvāymoḻinta ruḷat tirumukam [pi]rasāda ñcey-
taruḷi vara nimanta ñ ceytatu [|*] itu panmā heśvara ra kṣai ||—

ON THE SAME WALLS.

• jaṉ paraniru[pa]rākkatanāṉa vīracoḻa iḷaṅkoveḷānum eyiṟkoṭṭattu
eyināṭṭu nakaram kāñci[pura]ttut tirumiyānamuṭaiyār koyiliṉ kiḻai-

tu tirukkāraikkāṭuṭaiyār tevatānamāṉa

yāṉa nilattup

tiruvoṭainilam oṉṟaraiyum ikkaṭṭaḷaiyil ceṅkaṉivāyantiru-

nantavaṉattu melpakkattu nāṟpatteṇṇāyiravaṉ maṭappuṟa nilattut tiruvoṭai-
yākac ceyta nila māṟumāvum ivvūrp piṭākai maturāntakap periḷamaināṭṭu
paṇṇaṅkuṭic ceriyāṉa parake

rinallūrilum maṇalūrāṉa kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻa-
nallūrilum kaṇṇuṭaiccīya ṉeṉṉum perāl ceyvitta tiruvoṭaikku mula-
paruṣaiyār nilattup palar[pa]kkalilum uṭaiyār tirukkiḷāñceṭiyuṭaiyār civa-
nāmattum uḻaiccāṇaṉ kalaiyaṉ sa

rppaṭi nilam iraṇṭe muṉṟumā araikkāṇiyiṉāl nilam iraṇṭe mukkāle
araikkāṇi muntirikaik kīḻk kālum ivvūr nilattu cekkiḻāṉ vairātarāyar
ceyvittat tiruttoṇṭarciruraittāṉ tiruṉantavaṉattukku ivar koṇṭu
viṭṭa ūr māvinta kaṭamai kuṭimai kaḻittu kalveṭṭuppeṟṟa nilamāyt tiruvo-
ṭaiyi lakappaṭṭa nilam eṭṭumāk kāṇi muntirikaik kīḻk kālum poṉme[y*]n-
taperumāḷ tiruṉantavaṉattuṭaṉ kūṭiṉa makaṉaṅkakkāṟan tirunantavaṉakkuṭi-

kaḷ jivitattu akappaṭṭa palavaravai nilam iraṇṭumā mukkāṇi araikkāṇik kiḻa-
raiyum āka nilam muṉṟe āṟumāk kāṇi araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum veḷarpāṭi-
yil palapaṇi nimantakkāṟar jīvitamāṉa nilattut tāykkorampokātāṉ coḻa-
koṉeṉṉum perāl(c) ceyta tiruvoṭainilam iruveliyum tiyākava[l*]lic-
caruppetimaṅkalattu māṟaṉpāṭi nattattukku meṟkkuppaṭṭa nilattuk kiḻakkaṭaiya-
niṉṟa vaḷākameṉṉum perāl ceyta coḻakoṉ tiruvoṭai nilam patiṟṟu
veliyum

kīḻpūntamaṅkalattuc coḻakoṉtiruvoṭai eṉṉum perāl ceyta tiruvoṭai
nilam nālveliyum śrīviranārāyaṇaccaruppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai akkāramag-
kalamāṉa tiruvampalapperu[m*]paḷ[ḷi]nallūril ceyvitta ceṅkaṉivāyaṉ tiru-
ōṭai nilam iraṇṭaraiyum puṉavāyil koṉṟainilattuc ceṅkaṉivāyaṉ tiru-
ōṭai nilam kāle araikkālum perumpeṟṟapuliyūril irumarapuntuyyaperumāḷ-
e[ri]t teṉpakkattum melpakkattum erikkuṉikkalāṉa nilattu āḷuṭaiyataṉi-
ṉāyaka[ṉ*] eṉṉum

civaṉāmattā[l] ceyta tiruoṭaiyum tiruoṭaikkuṭikaḷ kuṭiiruppu uḷpaṭṭa nilam
oṉṟaraiyum tiruoṭaiyākac ceytu ceṅkaḻuṉirākki tiruppaḷḷittāmam eṇ-
ṇavum ittiruoṭaikaḷil palapaṇi nivantakkāṟar jivitattu akappaṭṭa nilat-
tukku talaimāṟu jivitam aṭaittukkuṭukkavum perumpaṟṟappuliyūr nilattu palar-
pakkalum vilaikoṇṭa nilattukku vaṭakku nilam orumāviṉ kiḻaraiy[e o]rumā-
varaiyum ūrmā īnta kaṭamai kuṭimai tavira mulaparu

yār eḻutiṉa niyokap-
paṭiye taviravum iṉṉiyokamum nilam

māṇaṅkaḷum tirukkai oṭṭip paṇṭārattu oṭukkavum ippaṭikku
tirumāḷikaiyil kal veṭṭavum kaṭavatāka paṇṇuvate ippaṭikku ivai
coḻakoṉ eḻutteṉṟum inta tiruoṭaikaḷ avaṉi āḷappiṟantārāṉa kop-
peruñciṅkatevar tirumeṉikku naṉṟāka ivar mutalikaḷil perumāḷ(p)piḷḷai
āṉa coḻakoṉār ceyvittuk kal veṭṭiyatu evalttiṭṭiṉpaṭi

inscription.head:
No. 49.
(A.R. No. 461 of 1902).
ON THE SAME WALL.

l.ta:
vattikaḷ śrīavaṉiāḷappiṟantārāṉa kopperuñ-
ciṅkatevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattunālāvatu veṇāṭuṭaiyāṉ olai [|*] teṉṉavaṉ
piramārāyarum jayatuṅkappallava[r*]aiyarum tillaiampalappallavaraiyarum uṭai-
yār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil

rak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum
śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum cāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyilnāyakañ ceyvār-
kaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum kaṇakkarum kaṇa•••

muṭaiyār koyil tiruppaḷḷiaṟainācciyār avaṉiāḷappiṟanta-
nācciyārkkup pūcaikkup perumāppiḷḷaiyāṉa coḻakoṉār ātittapaṭṭarāṉa
tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyārum tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār ulakuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉum pakkal
śrīviranārāyaṇaccaruppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai maturāntakanallūril veṟu-
piṟinta attiya[ya*]ṉapaṭṭarkaḷ akarappaṟṟu iṟaiyiliuṭaṉ cernta ivarkaḷ
kāṇiyum iṟaiyiliyumāṉa nilattu iṟaiyili uṭpaṭa vilaikoṇṭu tiruppāv[ā]-
•••

oṭṭip paṇṭārattile cātaṉamum oṭukkip palapaṇi nivantakkāṟarkku jivitam
aṭait[ta] nilam patiṉeṭṭumāk kāṇi araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiye ira-
ṇṭumāk kāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ araiyum tevatāṉam tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy
antarāyam pāṭṭam uṭpaṭa iṟaiyiliyāy muṉpu aṉupavittup pontapaṭiye
aṉupavikkavum innilam perumpāṭikāval uṭpaṭa aṉaittuvaṟkaṅkaḷum uṭpaṭa
iṟaiyiliyākavum ippaṭikkut tirumāḷikaiyil[e]•••

m kaṭavatākaccoṉṉo[m] [|*] ippaṭi ceyvateṉṟu tevar tirumukam varukaiyil
ittirumukappaṭiye tirumāḷikaiyile kal veṭṭivikkavum kaṭavatākap paṇṇuvate
[|*] ivai veṇāṭuṭaiyāṉ eḻuttu eṉṟu pukunta ēvaṟtiṭṭiṉpaṭi kal veṭṭi-
yatu

inscription.head:
No. 50.
(A.R. No. 462 of 1902).
ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

edition.l:
svasti śrī cakalapu[vaṉacca]kkaravattikaḷ avaṉiāḷappiṟantārā[ṉa] śrī[ko]ppe-
ruñciṅkatevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu ḷ 325- ṉāl taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟap-
puliyūr mulaparuṣai yār eḻuttu [|*] nammur nilakkaṇakku taṉmapiriyaṉum

l.ta:
tillaimuvāyi[ra]veḷāṉum kaṇṭu uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār cātti-
aruḷa aracūruṭaiyār ceṅkaṉivāyarāṉa piḷḷai coḻakoṉār āḷiyār tirunanta-
vaṉamākac ceyyak koṇṭu viṭṭa ivvūr melpi(ṭ)ṭākai kaṅkaikoṇ-

edition.l:
ṭacoḻapperiḷamaināṭṭu iruntacceriyāṉa caṇṭeśva ranallūrppāl śrīcuntara-
coḻavatikku meṟku śrīcoḻakulacuntarivāykkālukkut teṟku 3- kū 4- catirattu
vācciyaṉ na[kka]ṉ tiruñāṉacampantaṉpakkal koṇṭu viṭṭa nilam

4 kiḻakku nta- ṉāl maṭakku nilam m vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ
da[bhra]sabhāpa tiyum ivaṉ tampi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tevakaḷtevaṉum-
pakkal vilaikoṇṭa nilamāy vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ

l.ta:
yarperil kuṟaitta nilam [mu]kkāṇi araikkāṇikkiḻ muṉṟu
mā mukkāṇiyiṉāl maṭakkunilam kiḻakku i-m uṭaiyār tiruppuli

ramuṭaiyār tiru-
nāmattukkāṇiyāyp parivattaṉaiyāṟ pukunta iṣapatevaviḷākameṉṟu peru-

edition.l:
ṭaiya nilattu nilam-m kha pama kiḻakku kha4- ṉāl maṭakku nilam pa ma kiḻakku n ta-m uṭai-
yār tiruppuliśva ramuṭaiyār tirunantavaṉattu uṭkkiṭaiyāy akappaṭa palavaravai
[ni]ṟṟamutu caṅkaṭuvāṉukku acceric cāttaṅkuṭiyi laṭaippāṉa nilattālk
ku[ḻi] eṇpatte-

l.ta: ḻe mukkāle oru māvukkut talaimāṟu iccaṇṭe

ranallūr iṣapatevarviḷā-
kattup parivattaṉaiyāyp pukunta kuḻi

pa-ṉāl ūrppaṭi nilam kiḻakku -
ṉāl maṭakku nilam kiḻakku vum āka uṭaiyār tiruppuli

rivattaṉaiyāy pukunta nilamkhasa kiḻakku ma- ṉāl maṭakku nilam kiḻakku nta - vum āka
nilam kiḻakku i-ṉāl maṭakku nilam ma kiḻakku kha4 innilam ma kiḻakku
- ṉāl maṭakku nilam ma kiḻakkukha4 yum ipperarkaḷilk kuṟaittu

l.ta:
muṉṟāvatu pacāṉmutal ūrkkī ḻiṟaiyiliyāka ūrmāvinta kaṭamai kuṭimai nellarici
payaṟu uṭpaṭṭa kaṭamaikaḷ tavirntu ūrk kiḻiṟaiyiliyāka immaṭakkuk kaḻittu
ūril nikkiṉiṉṟa maṭakkile viḻukkā ṭiṭṭukkoḷḷak kaṭavutākappaṇṇu[vat*]e
[|*] ip-

paṭi ceyyakkaṭavutākac coṉṉom [|*] ivai aruḷāl ūrkkaṇakkut tiruvuṭai-
antaṇappiriyaṉ eḻuttu mulaparuṣaiyār eḻuti eḻuttiṭṭa niyokappaṭi
kal veṭṭiyatu

inscription.head:
No. 51.
(A.R. No. 463 of 1902).
ON THE SAME WALL.

l.ta:
cakalapuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī avaṉiyāḷappiṟantārāṉa kop-
peruñciṅkatevarkku yāṇṭu aiñcāvatu coḻakoṉ olai [|*] teṉṉavaṉ

k kaṇkāṇi ceyvār-
kaḷum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum

mutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyilnāyakañ cey-
vārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum koyiṟ kaṇakkarug kaṇṭu jayaṅko-

nallūr tarappaṭi nilam muṉṉūṟ
ṟaṟupattu nālveliyil uḷḷurp palatevarkaḷ tevatāṉaṅkaḷum tiruviṭaiyāṭ-
ṭaṅkaḷum piṭāripaṭṭi tukkaipaṭṭi paḷḷiccantam uḷḷiṭṭa nilam nāṟpattaṟu
veliyum

akara makāvipūticcaruppetimaṅkalam nilam paṉṉiru veliyum ceṭṭalūr pirāṉpaṭṭa-
ṉukkum māṭapocai varatarājapaṭṭaṉukkum vaṅkippuṟattu karuṇākarapaṭṭaṉuk-
kum paṭṭavirutti nilam veliyum kaṭikai[y]ār iṟaiyili nilam muṉṟe mu-

kkālum āka nilam aṟupattiraṇṭe kālum nikki nikki[niṉṟa*] nilam muṉṉūṟ
ṟoṉṟe mukkālum ivvūrk kollaip puṉceyyum kācāyaṅkaḷum veṭṭi
pāṭikāvalum arippāṭikāvalum uḷḷiṭṭa kācāyaṅkaḷum nel[l]āyaṅkaḷum
ivvūr tevatāṉam akarag-

kaḷ uḷppaṭṭa iṟaiyilikaḷukku muṉpu koṇṭuvarum āyaṅka ḷuḷppaṭat taṉiyūr
perumpaṟṟappuliyūr uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārkku aiñcāvatu āṭimāta-
mutal tevatāṉa iṟaiyiliyāka i[k*]koyiṟ teṟki[l] tiruvācal cokkac-
ciyaṉ tirunilai eḻukopurat tiruvācal-

t tiruppaṇik kuṭalāka viṭṭo meṉṟum ippaṭic cantirātittavarai tevatāṉa
iṟaiyiliyākac ceyvatāka āṟṟūr tirumuttī

muṭaiyār koyiṟ kallum
veṭṭi nāṟpā lellaiyilum tiruccūla

paṉamum paṇṇi uṭaiyār tiruvekam-
pamuṭaiyār koyililum

kallum veṭṭivitta teṉṟum ippaṭi koyiṟ kaṇakkilu miṭṭu koyililum kallu
veṭṭivippa teṉṟum tevar tirumukam varukaiyil ittirumukam iraṇṭā nilat-
til kokkavum paṇṇuvate [|*] ivai coḻakoṉ eḻuttu [e]ṉṟu vanta ēvaṟ-
tiṭṭiṉpaṭi kal veṭṭiyatu

inscription.head:
No. 52.
(A.R. No. 464 of 1902).
ON THE SAME WALL.

edition.l:
svasti śrī ḥ cakalapuvaṉaccakkaravatti kaḷ avaṉiāḷappiṟantārāṉa śrīkopperuñ-
[ci]ṅkatevaṟku yāṇṭu 5- vatu nāḷ 314- ṉāl coḻako ṉolai [|*] teṉ-
ṉavaṉ brahma mārāyarum jayatuṅkappallavaraiyarum tillaiyampalappal[la]varaiyarum
uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil śrīmā heśvara kaṇkāṇi ceyvārka-
ḷum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum sā[mu] tāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyilṉāyakañ
ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum kaṇakkarum kaṇ(ṭ)ṭu viṭutantatā-
vatu [|*]

l.ta:
koyilukkum tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya periyanācciyārkkum cāttiaruḷa tiruc-
ceṅkaḻunirt tirupaḷḷittāmamākka perumāḷ tiruvoṭai eṉṉum perāl cey-
kiṟa tiruvoṭaikku perumpaṟṟappuliyūrt teṉpiṭākai [pu]valokamāṇikka-
vaḷanāṭṭu koppāṭiyāṉa [ka]ṇapatinallūrppāl coḻamātevivatikku meṟ-
[ku]m

vivāykkālukkut teṟkum aiñcāg kaṇṇāṟṟu ṉālāñ catirattu
teṉkiḻ [ka]ṇṭattu vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ comaṉpakkal vācci-
yaṉ etirilāpperumāḷ tiruvalañcuḻiyuṭaiyāṉperil kācu āyirat

taiññūṟṟukku vilaikoṇṭa kuḻi aiññūṟ ṟorupattiraṇṭum ivvūril ikkaṇ-
ṇāṟṟu iccatirattu uḻaiccāṇaṉ koṟṟaṉ kovaṉpakkal meṟpaṭiyāṉperilk
kācu āyirat taiññūṟṟukku vilaikoṇṭa kuḻi aiññūṟ ṟorupattiraṇṭum ākak
kācu muvāyirattukku vilaikoṇṭa kuḻi āyirat tirupattunāliṉāl ūrppaṭi nilam
eṭṭumā innilam eṭṭumāviṉāl virivunilam araiye kāṇi iṉnilam araiye
kāṇiyum aiñcāvatu mutal tirucceṅkaḻunī riṭṭut tiruppūmaṇṭapattu mutalā[ka]
eṇṇavum iṉṉilam vilai-
naṅkaḷum innilattukku maṭaṅku kaḻitta ūravar eḻutiṉa niyo

g-
kaḷum tirukkaiy oṭṭip paṇṭārattup pukaviṭṭu etiriṭai iṭṭu ippaṭi[k*]-
ku[t*] tirumāḷikaiyile kal veṭṭappaṇṇuvate [|*] ivai coḻako ṉeḻu-
ttu eṉṟum pukunta ē[va*]lttiṭṭiṉpaṭi kal veṭṭiyatu [||*]

inscription.head:
No. 53.
(A.R. No. 465 of 1902).
ON THE SAME WALL.

l.ta:
varkku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu nāḷ eṇpattoṉṟu coḻako ṉolai [|*] teṉ-
ṉavaṉ pirammār[ā]yarum maturāntaka viḻupparaiyarum uṭaiyār

k kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum cikāri-
yañ ceyvārkaḷum cāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyilnāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tiru-
māḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum paṇṭārappottaka muṭai-

yārkaḷum kaṇakkarum kaṇṭu viṭutantatāvatu [|*] vikkiramaciṅkapurattu melpuṟattil
ceyvitta āḷiyār tiruttoppil maraṅkaḷā(ā)kkavum ittiruttoppil palāk-
kāy vāḻaikkāy paḻaṅkaḷ uḷḷiṭṭaṉa tirumaṭaippaḷḷi-

p paṇṭārattukku mutalāka eṭukkavum toppukkuṭikaḷāka aimpatu āḷ mutalkoḷḷa-
vum ivāḷukku iraṇṭumāvāka nūṟumā ni[la]m ivvūr eriyālum mutalaipāṭi-
eriyālum nīrpāyum nilattile muṉṟāvatu āṉimā(ā)-

ta mutal aṭaittuk kuṭukkappaṇṇuva teṉṟu tevar tiruveḻuttuccāttiṉa tiru-
mukam vantamaiyil āḷiyārtiruttop peṉṉum perāl ceyta tiruttoppukku
nāṟpatteṭṭu āḷum iraṇṭu nāyakamum āka aimpatu āḷ

muṉṟāvatu nāḷ eḻupatumutal mutalkoḷḷavum ipperkku ilakkaikkum koṟ-
ṟukkum cerkkacciyaṉ kamukutirunantavaṉak kuṭikaḷ peṟṟuvarukiṟapaṭiye nāyakap-
per iraṇṭukku koṟṟukku per oṉṟukku nāḷ oṉṟukku muk-

kuṟuṇiyāka vanta nellum puṭavaimutal āṭṭaikkup perāl muṉṟāka va[n]ta
kācum per nāṟpatteṇvarkku koṟṟukkup per oṉṟukku nāḷ oṉṟukku patak-
kāka vanta nellum puṭavaimutal āṭṭaikkup perāl iraṇ-

ṭāka va[n]ta kācum innāḷmutal peṟṟu ittiruttoppil maraṅkaḷumākki it-
tiruttoppil palākkāy vāḻaikkāy paḻaṅkaḷ uḷḷiṭṭaṉa tirumaṭaippaḷḷip
paṇṭārattukku mutalāka eṭukkavug kaṭavarkaḷākavum i-

varkaḷukkuk koṟṟukkuṭaiya nellukkum puṭavaimutal kācukku kācu oṉṟukku pati-
ṉaiṅkalappaṭiyāl vanta nellukkum ivvūril iṭṭa nilam nūṟumāvum ivar-
kaḷukku aṭaittukkuṭukkavum ippaṭikkuk kulot-

tuṅkacoḻaṉ tirumāḷikaip puṟavāyile kalveṭṭavug kaṭavatākavum paṇṇuva-
te [|*] ivai coḻakoṉ eḻutteṉṟu vanta evaṟtiṭṭiṉpaṭi kal veṭṭi-
yatu

inscription.head:
No. 54.
(A.R. No. 466 of 1902).
ON THE SAME WALL.

l.ta: varkku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu nāḷ eṇpattoṉṟu coḻakoṉ

ōlai [|*] teṉṉavaṉ pirammārāyarum maturāntakaviḻupparaiyarum uṭaiyār tiruc-
ciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil

cikāriyañceyvārkaḷum cāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyilnāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum
tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum paṇṭārappottaka mu-

ṭaiyārkaḷug kaṇakkarug kaṇṭu viṭutantatāvatu [|*] koyilukkum tirukkāmakkoṭṭa-
muṭaiya periyanācciyār koyilukkum pālamutu ceytaruḷavum pāṟ-

poṉakap pālukkum kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ tirukkocālai aṇukkaṉ curavikaḷukku
mutalāka iṣapamum tiruc[cū]lamuñ cāttit tirukkocālai yiṭaiyarkku muta-

lāka muṉṟāvatu nāḷ aṟupattāṟināl viṭṭa pacu nāṉūṟ ṟorupatiṉāl uru oṉ-
ṟukku celavirācakecariyāl uḻakkāka nāḷoṉṟukku pāl kalaṉe aṟunāḻi-
uriyu[m]

viṭṭu amutuceytaruḷavum muṉpu nivantakkaṭṭuppaṭi viṭṭu amutu ceytaruḷi vanta
pā(l)lile ippāl kalaṉe aṟunāḻi uriyum viṭukai tavirntu ippālukku muṉ-

pi lāṇṭukaḷum ney oṭṭukoṇṭu varumpaṭiye ney mutalkoṇṭu tirumaṭaip-
paḷḷip paṇṭārattukku mutalāka aḷakkavum intap pacukkaḷukku pacu nūṟṟai-

mpatukku per oṉṟāka vanta per mutalkoḷḷavum ipperkku koṟṟukku per
oṉṟukku nāḷ oṉṟukku patakkāka vanta nellum puṭavaimutal āṭṭaikkup
perāl oṉṟarai-

yāka vanta kācukkup patiṉaiṅkalappiṭiyāl vanta nellum palapaṇi nivantakkāṟarkku
jīvitam aṭaikkumpaṭiye jivitam aṭaikkavum periyatevarkku muṉṟāvatu kuṭu-

tta pacu eṇṇūṟ ṟeḻupatum nālāvatu kuṭutta pacu irunūṟṟorupattāṟum āka[t]
tirumañcaṉattukku āṭiyaruḷa veṇṇaiurukku neykkum pāluk kuṭalākavum
tevakoṉ

pacu āyiratteṇpattāṟiṉāl uru oṉṟukku celvirācakecariyāl uḻakkāka aḷan-
tuvarukiṟa pāl irukalaṉe irutūṇik kuṟuṇi eḻunā[ḻi] uriyum ākap pacu
āyirattu

nāṉūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟāṟum viṭṭapaṭikku kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ tirumāḷikaip
puṟavāyi[li*]le kal veṭṭavug kaṭavat[ā]kavum paṇṇuvate [|*] ivai coḻa-
koṉ eḻutteṉ-

inscription.head:
No. 55.
(A.R. No. 467 of 1902).
ON THE SAME WALL.

l.ta:
vaṟku yāṇṭu
patiṉāṟāvatu nāḷ irunūṟ ṟaṟupat[ti]raṇṭu coḻakoṉ olai [|*] teṉṉavaṉ

mārāyarum maturāntakaviḻupparaiyarum uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai-
yār koyil

mutāyañ
ceyvārkaḷum koyilnāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum
paṇṭārappottaka muṭaiyārkaḷum kaṇakkarug kaṇṭu viṭutantatāvatu [|*] ko-
yi(l)lukkum

tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya periyanācciyārkkum vecālippāṭippaṟṟu pūvālaiyil
cokkacciyaṉ kamukutirunantavaṉattukku tirunantavaṉañ ceyya mutal koṇṭa
nāyakam per aiñcum per teṇṇūṟṟaiñcum ākap per nūṟṟuvarkku ilakkaik-
kum koṟṟukkum ivvū-

ril aṭaitta nilam irunūṟṟu nāṟpat teḻumā araikkāṇiyiṉāl nellu āṟāyi-
rattu toḷā[yi]rat torupatteṇ kalaṉe irutūṇik kuṟuṇiyum patiṉaiñcā-
vatu nāḷ irunūṟ ṟaṟupat tiraṇṭumutal antarāyam pāṭṭam uḷppaṭa iṟaiyili-
yāka iṭṭut tevar tiru-

veḻuttuc cāttiaruḷiṉa tirumukam vantamaiyil cokkacciyaṉeṉṉum tirunāmat-
tāl ceyta kamukutirunantavaṉattukkum cuṟṟukkulaikkum vecālippāṭināṭṭuk
kuṟuñci aḷanāṭṭut tevatāṉam ciṟupālaiyūrppāl pūntamaṅkalattum i

ṭṭu kuṟuñci aḷanāṭṭut tevatāṉam tāmaraiyāṉpāṭiyāṉa veḷaṅkaṉpaṭṭilum
veḷḷāṟṟukku melkaraippaṭṭa tuṇṭattum kūṭiṉa nilattuk kamukutaṟ[ai]yum
cuṟṟukkulaiyum uḷppaṭa virivu nilam aṟupattumuṉṟumā mukkāṇi kīḻ mukkālum
nīṅkalākavum ittirunan-

tavaṉañ ceyya veṇṭum perāy niccayitta nāyakam per aiñcum per toṇ-
ṇūṟṟaiñcum ākap per nūṟu i[ti]l nāyakam per aivarkku koṟṟukku nāḷ
oṉṟukku per oṉṟukku mukkuṟuṇiyāka nellu kalaṉe mukkuṟuṇiyum puṭavai-
mutal āṭṭaikku perāl muṉṟā-

kak kācu patiṉaiñcum per toṇṇūṟṟaivarkku koṟṟukku nāḷ oṉṟukku po
oṉṟukku nellu pa[ta]kkāka nellu patiṉaiṅkalaṉe irutūṇip patakkum puṭavai-
mutal āṭṭaikkup perāl kācu iraṇṭāka kācu nūṟṟuttoṇṇūṟum ākap
per nūṟṟuvarkku koṟṟukku nāḷ o-

ṉṟukku nellu patiṉeḻu kalaṉe kuṟuṇiyum āka āṭṭaikku uṭaiya nellukkum
puṭavaimutal āṭṭaikku kācu irunūṟṟaiñcukkum kācu oṉṟukku patiṉaiṅkalap-
paṭiyāl vanta nellukkum tevatāṉamāṉa ūrkaḷil palapaṇi nivantakkāṟarkku
cīvitamaṭaikkumpaṭi-

yāluḷḷa nellukku vecālippāṭippaṟṟu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaccaruppetimaṅka-
lattuk kīḻpiṭākai pūvālaicuntaracoḻanallūril patiṉaiñcāvatu nāḷ irunūṟ
ṟaṟuppattiraṇṭu mutal antarāyam pāṭṭam uḷppaṭa tevatāṉa iṟaiyili iṭṭa
nilam irunū-

ṟṟu nāṟpatteḻumā varaikkāṇikku māttāl nellu irupatteṇ kalamāka nellu
āṟāyirattu toḷāyirat torupat toṉpatiṉ kalaṉe tūṇip patakkum ākat
tirunan[ta]vaṉattaṟai uḷppaṭa [ni]lam eḻupatteḻaraiye nāṉmā varai muntiri-
kaik kīḻmukkāliṉāl viri-

vu nilam muṉṉūṟ ṟorupatumā mukkāṇi araikkāṇik kiḻmukkālum antarāyam
pāṭṭa muḷppaṭa tevatāṉa iṟaiili iṭṭamaikku kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ tiru-
māḷikaiyil puṟavāyile kal veṭṭikkoḷḷakkaṭavatākap paṇṇuvate [|*]
kamukutaṟaiyum cuṟṟukkulaiyum

nilam aṟupattumuṉṟumā mukkāṇik kiḻmukkālum tirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷukku jivitam
aṭaitta nilam irunūṟṟu nāṟpatteḻumā araikkāṇiyiṉāl nellu āṟāyirat-
tut toḷāyirattu orupattoṉpatiṉ kalaṉe tūṇi patakkukkum [|*] ivai
coḻakoṉ eḻuttu

inscription.head:
No. 56.
(A.R. No. 468 of 1902).
ON THE SAME WALL.

l.ta:
vaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉā-
ṟāvatu nāḷ irunūṟṟu irupatteṭṭu coḻakoṉ olai [|*] teṉṉavaṉ-

rāyarum maturāntakaviḻupparaiyarum uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai-
yār koyiṟ

mutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyilnāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum [ti]rumāḷikaikkūṟu
ceyvārkaḷu[m pa]ṇṭārappottaka muṭaiyārkaḷum kaṇakkarum kaṇṭu viṭutanta-
tāvatu [|*] koyilukkum tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya periyanācciyārkkum ciṟap-
pākac cāttiaruḷa

coḻakoṉār perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai paḷḷippaṭaiyāṉa vikkiramacoḻanal-
lūril palavaravaiyāṉa nilattuc ceyvitta ceṅkaṉivāyaṉ tirunantavaṉattaṟaikku

mākavum ittirunantavaṉañ ceyya veṇṭum perāy ivar niccayitta
nāyakam per iraṇṭum per muppattunālum tiruppūmaṇṭapattu tiruppaḷḷit-
tāman toṭukkum per iraṇṭum āka per muppatteṇvarkkum ilakkaikkum
koṟṟukkum viru

timaṅkalattu
vaṭapiṭākai maturāntakanallūril ivar vilaikoṇṭu tirunāmattu-

ṇappaṭi nilamāy pāṭi-
kāval veḷḷāṉveṭṭi antarāyam pāṭṭam uḷppaṭa tevatāṉa iṟaiyiliyāka
iṭṭa [ti]ṟappu kārmaṟu nilam muppattāṟumā mukkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiye
mummā varaiyiṉāl nellu āyirattu nāṉūṟ ṟoṉpatiṉkalaṉe aiṅkuṟuṇi iru-
nāḻi uri yāḻākkum orupū nilam araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻoṉpatumā varaiye
araikkāṇiyiṉāl nellu nāṟkalaṉe eḻukuṟuṇi eḻunāḻiyum āka kārmaṟuvum
orupūvum nilam muppatteḻumā muntirikaik kiḻ muṉṟumā varaikkāṇiyiṉāl
nellu

āyirattu nāṉūṟ ṟorupattunāṟ kalaṉe kuṟuṇi irunāḻi uri āḻākku itil it-
tirunantavaṉattaṟaikku

kak kuṭutta nilam paṉṉiraṇṭu māviṉāl
nellu nāṉūṟṟu aṟupattoru kalaṉe aiññāḻi nikki ittirunantavaṉakkuṭi-
kaḷukku ilakkaikkum koṟṟukkum uṭalāṉa nilam irupattañcumā muntirikaik
kiḻ muṉṟumā varaikkāṇiyiṉāl nellut toḷāyirat taimpattumukkalaṉe
nāṉāḻi uriyum āka nilam muppatteḻumā muntirikaik kiḻ muṉṟumā varaikkāṇi-
yiṉāl ne-

llu āyirattu nāṉūṟ ṟorupattunāṟkalaṉe kuṟuṇi irunāḻi uriyum tirunāmattuk-
kāṇiyum tevatāṉa iṟaiyiliyumāy antarāyam pāṭṭam uḷppaṭa iṟaiyili-
yākavum nikki ittirunantava[ṉa]kkuṭikaḷukku aṭaikkaveṇṭum nellu āyirat
teḻunūṟṟu nāṟpat taṟukalaṉe irutūṇi mukkuṟuṇimuṉṉāḻi urikkum maturān-
takanallūril tiṟappu kārmaṟuvum orupūvumāṉa nilattile nellukku veṇṭum
nilam tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyāka antarāyam pāṭṭa muḷppaṭavum tillaivaṉamuṭaiya
pa

nāḷ eṟupaṭikkum kaṟi viṟaku uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉattukkum veṇṭum nellut
toḷāyirat taimpattu orukalamum maturāntakanallūril tiṟappu kārmaṟuvum oru-
pūvumāṉa nilattile nellukku okka aṭaittu tillaivaṉamuṭaiya pa

kku
a[n]tarāyam pāṭṭa muḷpaṭa tevatāṉa iṟaiyiliyākavum ippaṭikaḷāl van[ta]
nilamum nellum patiṉañcāvatu nāḷ irunūṟṟu aṟupattiraṇṭu mutal ivvūril
kaḻittu

vaḷanāṭṭu neluvūrnāṭṭu mutalumāy tirucciṟṟampalamaṅkala-
meṉṉun tirunāmattāl veṟu-

var tiruveḻuttuc cāttiṉa tiru-
mukam vantamaiyil ceṅkaṉivāyaṉ tirunantavaṉa nilam muveliyum tirunantavaṉañ
ceytu tiruppaḷḷittāmam aḷakka mutalkoṇṭa nāyakam per iraṇṭum per
muppattunālum tiruppūmaṇṭapattu tiruppaḷ[ḷi]ttāman toṭukkum per iraṇ-
ṭum ākap per muppatteṭṭum patiṉaiñcāvatu nāḷ irunūṟ ṟaṟupattiraṇṭu-
mutal mutalkoṇṭu ivarkaḷil tirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷ nāyakam per iruvaṟku
koṟṟukku nāḷ oṉ-

ṟukkup perāl nellu mukkuṟuṇiyāka nellut tūṇip patakkum puṭavaimutal
āṭṭaikkup perāl kācu muṉṟākak kācu āṟum per muppattunālvaṟku koṟ-
ṟukku nāḷ oṉṟukku perāl nellup patakkāka nellu aiṅkalaṉe irutūṇiyum
puṭavaimutal āṭṭaikkup perāl kācu iraṇṭākak kācu aṟupatteṭṭum tirup-
pūmaṇṭapattu tiruppaḷḷi[t*]tāman toṭukkum per iruvarkku koṟṟukku
nāḷoṉṟukkup perāl nellu mukkuṟuṇiyāka nellu tūṇip patakkum puṭa-
vaimutal āṭṭaikkup perāl kā-

cu muṉṟākak kācu āṟum ākap per muppatteṇvarkkuk koṟṟukku nāḷ oṉṟukku
n(o)llu aṟukalaṉe irutūṇiyāka āṭṭaikkuṭaiya nellukkum puṭavai-
mutalk kācu eṇpatukkuk kācu oṉṟukku patiṉaiṅkalappaṭiyāl vanta nellukkum
tevatāṉamāṉa ūrkaḷil jīvitamaṭaikkumpaṭiyāluḷḷa nellukkum tirunantavaṉat-
taṟaikkum

kai maturāntakanallūril pāṭikāval veḷḷāṉveṭṭi antarāyam pāṭṭam uḷpaṭa-
vum tevatāṉa iṟaiyili iṭṭu innāṭṭil mutalun tavirntu i

vaḷa-
nāṭṭu neluvūrnāṭṭile mutalumāy tirucciṟṟampalamaṅkalameṉṉun tirunāmat-
tāl veṟupiṟinta nilattukku kaṭṭaḷaikkaṇakku perumpuliyūruṭaiyāṉ eḻut-
tiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi nilam irupattiraṇṭe āṟumāk kāṇi araikkāṇi muntiri-
kaik kiḻmukkāle araimāviṉāl virivu nilam eṇpatteḻumā varaikkāṇi mun-
tiri-

kaik kiḻk kāle kāṇi araikkāṇi itil taramili nilam araimā arai[k]kāṇik
kiḻmukkāle irumā varaiye araikkāṇi nikki tarampeṟṟa nilam eṇpattāṟumā
varaiyiṉ kiḻeḻumā mukkāṇi itil palarpakkalum vilaikoṇṭu tirunāmattuk-
kāṇiyākat tirukkaioṭṭi paṇṭārattuk kuṭutta piramāṇappaṭi nilam eḻupatu-
mā mukkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻarai itil taramili nīroṭukālum kuḷamum peruvaḻi-
yum payirceyyaoṇṇāp pāḻumnilam araimā araikkāṇik kīḻmukkāle irumā
varaiye

araikkāṇi nikkit tarampeṟṟa nilam eḻupatumā varaikkāṇik kiḻaraiye iraṇṭu-
māk kāṇi araikkāṇi itil tiṟappuk kārmaṟu nila muppattāṟumā mukkāṇi mun-
tirikaik kīḻaraiye mummā varaiyiṉāl nellu āyirattu nāṉūṟṟoṉpatiṉ
kalaṉe aiṅkuṟuṇi irunāḻi uri āḻākkum orupū nilam araikkāṇi muntirikaik
kīḻoṉpatumā varaiye araikkāṇiyiṉāl nellu nāṟkalaṉe eḻukuṟuṇi eḻu-
nāḻiyum nīkki nilattu palatevarkaḷ tevatāṉamāṉa nilattukkut talaimāṟu teva-
tāṉam aṭaitta

kuṭippe[ri]le ittevarkaḷukku tevatāṉamākac certtukkuṭuttup pukunta kār
maṟu nilam irupatumā mukkāṇi araikkāṇiyiṉāl nellu eṇṇūṟ ṟaṟupattaṟu-
kalaṉe tūṇip patak korunāḻi uḻakkum orupū nilam patiṉorumā araikkāṇi
muntirikaik kiḻoṉpatumāk kāṇiyiṉāl nellu irunūṟ ṟirupatteḻukalaṉe
aiṅkuṟuṇi aiññāḻi muvuḻakkum akaram virapperumāḷmaṅkalam nilam orumā[vi]-
ṉāl nellu muppatteḻukalaṉe patakku nāṉāḻi urikku akaraoṭṭuppaṭi nellu
patiṉaiṅkalaṉe eḻukuṟuṇi

orunāḻiyum ākak kārmaṟuvum orupūvum nilam eḻupatumā araikkāṇik kiḻaraiye
iraṇṭumāk kā[ṇi] araikkāṇi[yi]ṉāl taravaricaippaṭiyum akaraoṭṭuppaṭiyum
nellu iraṇṭāyirat taiññūṟ ṟirupattu mukkalaṉe irutūṇi orunāḻi uri
itil tirunantavaṉattaṟai[k]ku

māka viṭṭa virapperumāḷmaṅkalam
uṭpaṭa nilam paṉṉiraṇṭumāviṉāl akaraoṭṭu uḷpaṭa nellu nāṉūṟṟu muppat-
toṉpatiṉ kalaṉe aiṅkuṟuṇi orunāḻi uri nīkki ittirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷukkum
tiruppūmaṇṭapattu tiruppaḷḷittāma-

n toṭuppārkkum ilakkaikkum koṟṟukkum uṭalāṉa kārmaṟuvum orupūvum nilam
ai[m*]patteṭṭumā araikkāṇik kiḻaraiye iraṇṭumāk kāṇi araikkāṇi-
iṉāl nellu iraṇṭāyirat teṇpattu nāṟkalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi nikki tevatāṉa
iṟaiyili iṭṭuk kuṭipperil iṟukkac certta [k]ārmaṟu nilam patiṉaiñcumāk
kāṇi araikkāṇik kiḻmukkāle araimāviṉāl taravaricaippaṭi nellu aṟu-
nūṟṟu orupattaig kalaṉe irutūṇip patak korunāḻi uḻakkum orupūnila
mukkāṇi araikkāṇik kiḻmukkā-

le nālumā mukkāṇi araikkāṇiyiṉāl nellu irupattoru kalaṉe tūṇip patak
korunāḻi uḻakkum āka kār[ma]ṟuvum orupūvum nilam patiṉāṟumāk kāṇi muntiri-
kaik kiḻmukkāle kāṇi araikkāṇiyiṉāl nellu aṟunūṟṟu muppatteḻu-
kalaṉe tūṇi muṉṉāḻi uriyum ākak kārmaṟu nilam eḻupattunālumā varaikkāṇi
kiḻoṉpatumāviṉāl nellu iraṇṭāyirattu toḷāyirat teḻukalaṉe tūṇi
aṟunāḻiyum orupū nilam paṉṉiraṇṭumāk kāṇi muntirikaik kiḻmukkāle muṉ-
ṟumā mukkāṇiyiṉāl nellu

irunūṟ ṟaimpattu mukkalaṉe eḻukuṟuṇi eḻunāḻiyum ākak kārmaṟuvum orupūvum
nilam eṇpattāṟumā varaiyiṉ kiḻeḻumā mukkā[ṇi]yiṉāl nellu muvāyirat
torunūṟ ṟaṟupattoru kalaṉe aiññāḻiyum pāṭikāval veḷḷāṉveṭṭi an-
tarāyam pāṭṭam uḷppaṭa tevatā[ṉa] iṟaiyili iṭṭamaikku kulottuṅka-
coḻaṉ tirumāḷikaip puṟavāyi[li*]le kal veṭṭikkoḷḷak kaṭavatākap paṇ-
ṇuvate [|*] ivai coḻakoṉ eḻuttueṉṟu vanta evaṟtiṭṭu[p]paṭi kal
veṭṭiyatu

inscription.head:
No. 57.
(A.R. No. 469 of 1902).
ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE ARUNACHALESVARA TEMPLE
AT TIRUVANNAMALAI, TIRUVANNAMALAI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

ṉ eḻunta ruḷuvitta piccatevarkku vaitta tirununtāviḷakku iraṇṭukku viṭṭa

nuntāviḷakku iraṇṭukku nicatappaṭiyum muṭṭāme śantrā tittaval erippatā-
nom tiruvaṇṇāmalai maṉṟāṭikaḷom ivaṉe uṭaiyār śrīvimāṉattai cūḻa
ir(ā)vaisandhi kku aṇukkaviḷakkāka eriya vaitta viḷakku oṉṟukku eṇṇai
iruceviṭaraiyāka sandhi viḷakkup patiṉāliṉukku viṭṭa cāvā muvāp perāṭu muṉ-

l.ta:
ṟal lilāmulitecamum tenak-
kalarpoḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaḻaṟkāvaṟ kaṭumura[ṭ] kaṭāramum māpporu-

kaḷukkut tiruvaṇṇāmalai viyāpāri vayiri [ara]yaṉum aṭaikka-

icai

ivai eṉ eḻuttu [|*] ipparicu icai

ippaṭi yāṇṭu 27- avatu ḷ 1[28]- ṉā[l*] kalveṭṭiyatu [|*] ḷ- [1] ṉāl ati-
kārikaḷ rājarājamuventa veḷār maturānta kavaḷanāṭṭup peṇṇaivaṭakarait tiru-
vaṇṇāmalai uṭaiyār koyiliṉuḷḷāl ōlakkakūṭattiṉ muṉpirun tu kaṇakku ke-
ṭṭu ittevar tevatāṉam kiḻaṇṇāttu nilattil ā[ti]ppuliyūruṭaiyāṉ ko-
vaṉāccaṉāṉa kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻa aṇimurināṭāḻvāṉ kalluvitta amarttikaṇ-
ṭappe[r]erikkiḻ nilattil yāṇṭu 27- āvatu nāḷ [nū]ṟṟorupattoṉpatu-
mu[ta*]l tiruttalām nilattil ittevarkku śrīkāryañceyvāṉ oruvaṉukku
nāl oṉṟiṉukku nellu tūṇi[ppata]kkāka nāḷ muṉṉū[ṟ*][ṟaṟupa]tiṉukku
nellu nūṟṟeṇpatiṉ kalattukku nila muveliyum ittevarkku muṉpu
ka[ṇa]kkeḻuti varuvāṉ [o]ruvaṉukku mel[e]ṟṟam kaṇakkeḻutuvāṉ oruvaṉukku
nellup patakk[ā]ka nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟaṟupatiṉukku nellu aṟupatiṉ kalattukku
nila[m] veliyum āka iṉnila nālveliyum nikki niṉṟa nilattil yāṇṭu irupat-
teḻāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟorupatteṭṭuvarai ni[la][m*] k[ā]ṭu veṭṭit tiruttip
payirceyta nilattālum iṉṉāḷ mutal tiruttip payirceyyum nilattālum [u]-
maytāsarikkut teṟ[ku]ppaṭṭa kollainilattil payirceyta nilattālum payir-
ceyyum nilattālum avvav āṇṭukaḷ ceyta po[ka]ṅkaḷil svā mipokattāl
vanta nellum poṉṉug koṇṭu kārttikait tirunāḷilum paṅkuṉit tirunāḷi-
lum tiruvaṇṇāmalaiyuṭaiyāraic cevikka vanta civacokikaḷ uḷḷiṭṭa aṭiyārai
ūṭṭuka veṉṟum puṟa[t*]taṭiyārkku koṟṟaṭṭuka veṉṟum ittevar tevatāṉam
[vā]maṉpūṇṭiyāṉa puliyūrnāṭiccaruppetimaṅkalattuc cavaiyār kaṭava ūrk-
kaḻañcālug kumarakaccā[ṇa]ttālug kaṭava poṉ nā[ṟ]kaḻañ[cum] nāvaṟpūṇṭi-
yāṉa va[yira]mekaccaruppeti[ma]ṅkalattuc cavaiyār meṟpaṭi kaṭava poṉ
nāṟkaḻañcum kiḻaṇṇāttūrār meṟpaṭi kaṭava poṉ nāṟkaḻañcum tiruvaṇṇā-
malai nakarattār meṟpaṭi kaṭava poṉ nāṟkaḻañcum•••••
vaicca pūṇṭi[ū]rār meṟpaṭi kaṭava poṉ nāṟkaḻañcum•• pūṇṭi
[ū]rār meṟpaṭi kaṭava poṉ irukaḻañcum paṅkaḷanāṭṭu[k ku]ṇṭur [mu]rukaṭic-
caruppetimaṅkalattuc capaiyār meṟpaṭi kaṭava poṉ nāṟkaḻañcum ākak kaṭava
poṉ irupattaṟu kaḻañcum ittevar paṇṭārattukkallāl tuḷaiyo[ṭu] urai-
yokkum poṉne ittevar paṇṭārattukku u[ṭa*]lākat taṇṭi ippoṉṉāl
ittevar koyilile••••

l.ta:
[viḷak koṉṟiṉukku] ney [yuriyāka] nāḷoṉṟiṉukku naṟuney nāḻiyāka nāḷ muṉ-
ṉūṟ ṟaṟupatiṉukku ney muṉṉūṟ ṟaṟupati • ṉāḻiyiṉāl poṉ kaḻañciṉukku ney
aṟupati ṉāḻiyāka poṉ aṟukaḻañcum viḷakku oṉṟiṉukku kaṟpūra[m] mañcāṭiāka
viḷakku iraṇṭiṉukku orunāḷaikku kaṟpūram iraṇṭumañcāṭiyāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟ-
ṟaṟupatiṉukku kaṟpūra[m*] muppattaṟu kaḻañcum uṭaiyār tirumeyppūccukku orunāḷ

nāliṉukku kaṟpūram nālumañcāṭiyāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟ ṟaṟupatiṉukku kaṟpūram
eḻupattiru kaḻañcum āka kaṟpūram nūṟ ṟeṇkaḻañciṉāl poṉ kaḻañcukku kaṟpūram
aṟukaḻañcākap poṉ patineṇ kaḻañcumāka•• kaḻañcum nikkip poṉ
irukaḻañcum paṇṭārattukku mutalākavumāka ippaṭi

mākak koṇṭu iṭṭa-
paṭi cantirātittavaṟ ceykaveṉṟum ippaṭi ceyvataṟkuk kalveṭṭuka veṉṟum
atikārikaḷ coḻamaṇṭalattu uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaḻuntūrnāṭṭu
ari

manallūruṭaiyāṉ nilaṉ veṇkāṭaṉāṉa rājarāja muventaveḷār [i]p-
paricu ceyvitāka kal veṭṭuvittom tevarkaṉmikaḷom [||*]

(A.R. No. 480 of 1902).

edition.l:
svasti śrī | k[ā]rvaḷarmeṉik kamalakkaṇṇaṉ pārvaḷa runtip pallavarperumāṉ

nāṟpatteṇṇāyirapiḷḷaiyum ivar tamakkai maṅkaiya[r*]kkaraciyārun taṅkaḷ
poruḷiṭṭu aṇṇānāṭṭu ellaiyil tiruntikaiyāṟṟai aṭaittu eriyum

nallūr eṉṟu pe[ru mi]ṭṭu ci[ṟitu] nilamun
tiruttukaiyāley itukku ellaikaḷum viṭṭu kal veṭṭikkuṭuttu potukaccey
maṅkaiya[r*]kkaraciyārum marittu nāṟpatteṇṇāyirappiḷḷaiyun taḷantu ivve-

ṭeḻuntu neṭunāḷ pāḻkiṭakka tammāl ceyarpaṭāma[l ta]m marumakan k[āg]kaiyar

kaṭavaḷ[ā]ka iraṇṭāvatu nāḷile kal veṭṭikkuṭukka ivaḷum pattonpatāvatu-
varaiyum iveri maṭaikaḷum aṭaippiyāte kaliṅkum iṭāte

pāḻkiṭakk[ai]yāle nāṟpatteṇṇāyira[p]piḷḷai mak[kaḷ] kunṟan pallavarāyaṉum
kampan nāṟpatteṇṇāyirappiḷḷaiyum uḷḷiṭṭār eṅkaḷāl āṟum aṭaittu
eriyil maṭaikaḷum aṭaittu kaliṅkum iṭamuṭiyātu niṅkaḷ uṅkaḷ poruḷiṭṭu
ivveri maṭaikaḷum āṟum aṭaittu kaliṅkum iṭṭu nāṅka-

ḷ munpu ceytatukku ellai kollai kāṭu ka[ḻa]ni mūnṟil o[nṟu eg]kaḷukku viṭṭu
irukūṟu niṅkaḷ aṉupokiyuṅko ḷeṉṟu iva[r*]kaḷukku ivarkaḷ eḻuti eḻut-
tiṭṭukkuṭukkaiyāley iva[r*]kaḷ irukūṟṟil arumuḷaikiḻān nampi cittāṇ-
ṭaikku irukūṟum viṭuruṭaiyān pirāṭṭiyāḻvān malaikiniyaninṟān arintavan pa-

llavaraiya[r*]kku irukūṟum catācivatevar aruṇakirianpa[r*][k]ku orukūṟum
putuvūruṭaiyān koṇṭi tirunānacampantaveḷāṉukku orukūṟum tiruvāymūr
sa[va]na[n*] i[ḷai]yāḻvi tiruvaṇṇāmalai[p*]perumāḷukkuorukūṟum veṭciki-
ḻān peruṅkan atirekatiraveḷ[ā*]rkku orukūṟum miṭṭānminavan pallavaraiyaṟ-

ku orukūṟum tevara[ṭi]yāḷ tiruvampalampiriyātapiḷḷaiyāṟku orukūṟum āka pattuk-
kūṟāka niṟpārkaḷākavum [|*] ivvūrkku ellai malaippānpāṭikku poṉa vaḻikku
vaṭakku tiruntikaiāṟṟukku meṟkum tiruntikaikku teṟkum melpāṟkellai
munpu veṭṭiṉa ācāriyan kal-

aṭukkai cera veṭṭina tiruccūlakkallukkum itukku vaṭakku kuttukkallil veṭ-

veṭṭiṉa tiruccūlattukkug kiḻakkum [|*] inta nāṟpāṟkellaik kuḷpaṭṭa
naṉcai puṉcai kaṭamai ko-

ḷḷum iṭattu tiruttina āṇṭu pāṭikāval koḷḷakkaṭavatākavum itan etirā māṇṭu

mutal ellāāṇṭum veli aṟupatinkala nellum pāṭikāvalum koḷḷakka[ṭa]va-

pacāṉattukku onṟumukkāl koḷḷakkaṭavatākavum varakukku kāril onṟumukkāl

paṭi patiṉaiṅkala varakum muṉṉūṟu kācum koḷḷakkaṭavatākavum erippaṭṭi manṟāṭ-

i[v*]veriyile kuḻi veṭṭakkaṭavatākavum ippaṭi cammatittuk kal veṭṭik-

ceyyāṟṟukku

teṉkaraippaṭṭavūrkaḷil makuḻampūṇṭi nāṟpālellaik kuḷppaṭṭa naṉcai puṉcai
nilattil tevatāṉam paṭṭavirutti nikki nikkiniṉṟa nilamum innilattāl vanta
āyam pāṭikāval taṟii-

ṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭam kuṟṟatteṇṭa[m] paṭṭitteṇṭam veṭṭi taṉiyāḷ eri-

raṇa siṁhaṇadaṇḍanā-

[ṟ]tuḷaippuṇṇa vārātiruppil vaṭiyuḷavāñ cevvel makataiyārkomā ṉaṭi-

por vaḷava[r]koṉai varinta tiṟaikkāka vāṇā terintāṉai vāṅkiṉāyeṉṟu vaḻu-

veṭṭiyaṉṟe koṉṟa veṇmaṇippāṭi yutiraveḷḷat toṭ-

ttāṟkum ituve [celovu]tāka-

l.ta: nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara eṉaimannavar eriyaluṟ ṟu-
ḻitara tikkaṉaittun taṉ cakkara naṭātti vi
mutu muvāyirap palattukku nellu mukkalamum ne[y*]yamutu kuṟu-
ṇikku mukkalamum miḷakamutu nāṉāḻikku nellu ṉāṟ-

vaṭakkum kuppaieṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku meṟkum cattiyapāvai
eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukkum tiruviti tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ-
enṟu per kūvappaṭṭa [nilat]tu[kku]m naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam o[ru]veli inni-

lāyamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tiruvaraṅkanāṭāḻvāṉ sayiñaiāṉamaikku ivai ciṟutavūrk
kāṇiuṭaiya toṟṟuṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu [|*]

l.ta:
itu uṭaiyāṉ nañcuṇṭāṉāṉa neṟkuppaia[r*]aiyaṉ cayiññānataṉamaikku
tirukkarampantuṟaiuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilk kāṇiuṭaiya civappirāmaṇaṉ mut-
[taṉā]ṉa•••• [po]llātāṉ celvaṉāṉa poṉṉimaḻaināṭāḻ-
vāṉ cayiññātaṉamaikku putukkuṭiyāṉa rāce[n*]tiracoḻamaṅkalattu kāvalk-
kāṇi

uttamanampi eḻuttu [|*] ippaṭi aṟiveṉ tuṟaiyūruṭaiyāṉ vaṭakaraināṭṭu

periyakoyilnampi eḻuttu [|*] ippaṭi aṟiveṉ ālaṅkuṭaiyāṉ miṉavaṉ pal-

veṉ tukkuṭi tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyāṉ śrīnāraciṅkapaṭṭaṉeṉ [|*] ippaṭi aṟi-

nāṭṭuveḷāṉ eḻuttu [|*] ippaṭi aṟiveṉ nālūr periyāḻvāṉ ā[ka]ma-
rā[ya]ṉeṉ [|*] ippaṭi

aṟiveṉ uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyanāyaṉār tevatāṉam tirunāmattukkāṇi
kiḻāṟṟūr pūvālacuntaraviṇṇakar emaperumāṉ koyil tiruvaṭippi••

ṉāṉa cemmaiyāṇṭāṉeṉ

inscription.head:
No. 337.
(A.R. No. 62 of 1903).
ON THE SAME WALL.

l.ta:
ttu navamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟ[ṟa] urocaṇi nāḷ rā-
[ca*]rā[ca*]vaḷanāṭṭu-

p pācciṟkūṟṟattuk kiḻpalāṟṟut tuṟaiyūruṭaiyāṉ ara[yaṉ] nittakalliyāṇa-
ṉāṉa pāṇṭiyarā[ca*]ṉeṉ taṉmatāṉap piramāṇa icaivutiṭṭu [|*] pāṇṭi-
kulācaṉi-

vaḷanāṭṭu [viḷā]nāṭṭu uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil ātica-
ṇṭe
tevar kaṉmikaḷukku iṟṟaināḷāl nāṉ uṭaiyār tiruvāṉai-

kkāvuṭaiya ṉāyaṉāṟkut taṉmatāṉamāka[k] kuṭutta nilamāvatu [|*] innāṭṭu taṇṭaṉ-
kuṟaiyil taṇṭaṅkuṟaiuṭaiyāṉ tevāṇṭāṉāṉa teṉkaraināṭṭuveḷāṉum

taṇṭaṅkuṟaiuṭaiyāṉ perumāḷum ceyyāmaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ teṟṟi poṟko-
yilveḷāṉum uḷḷiṭṭārumpakkal muṉṉāḷ eṅkaḷ mutaliyār pāṇ-

ṭiyarāyar vilaikoṇṭu uṭaiyarāy ivar apā[va]ttu eṉṉu[tu]m eṅkaḷ māt[ā]k-
ka[ḷu]tumāṉa nilattu uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkā[vu]ṭ[ai]ya nāyaṉāṟ[ku] ivvāṭ-
ṭai mārkaḻimātattu nāṉ taṉmatāṉamāka [ni]rvā[t]tuk kuṭutta puṉcey nilam

pa
innilam eḻe iraṇ[ṭu*] māvukkum icainta kiḻpāṟkellai murimuriveli [el-
lai*]-

kku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kāveri niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai in-
nāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa [a]pputiku[ṟ]ai ellaikkuk kiḻakku-

m vaṭapāṟkellai paḻaṅkāveri niroṭukālukkut teṟkum āka icainta innāṉ-
kellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilattut taṇṭaṅkuṟaiuṭaiyāṉ āḷa-

ppiṟantāṉāṉa teṉkaraināṭṭuveḷāṉ uḷḷiṭṭār kāṇiāṉa nilam va innilam
kāle araimā araikkāṇi nikki mikutikkuṟai uḷḷaṭag-

pa-m inta murimurive[li]ellaikkuk kiḻakkum māvoṭutoṭṭamum
paṭāra[ṉ]paṟṟum eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭu eṅkaḷutāṉa pu[ṉ]ceynilattu appūti-
yāroḻukkaikku meṟku nercera mikutikkuṟai uḷḷaṭaṅka viṭṭa nilam

pa-m āka in-
nāyaṉāṟku taṉmatāṉamāka [nir]vārttu kuṭutta puṉcey nilam

innilam [eḻe] iraṇṭumāvum mikutikkuṟai uḷḷaṭaṅka ivvāṭṭai mārkaḻimāta-
[t*]te taṉmatāṉamāka nirvārttuk kuṭuttu innāḷvaraiyum

yūruṭaiyāṉ pāṇṭiyarāyaṉeṉ innilam eḻe iraṇṭumāvil meṉokkiṉa [ma]-
ramu[g kiḻ]nokkiṉa kiṇaṟukaḷum maṉaiyum maṉaippaṭappaiyum āṟum ā[ṟiṭu]-

paṭukaiyum potuvum potuvāriyum pākamum pākāciriyamum maṟṟum eppeṟpaṭṭa
urimaika[ḷum uḷpaṭa] taṉmatāṉamākak kuṭuttamaiyil innilattukku ivarka[ḷ]
veṇṭi-

māṇam paṇṇikkuṭukkak kaṭaveṉākavum [|*] kuṭuttile-
nākil inta taṉmatāṉap piramāṇa icavutiṭṭe

(taṉma)tāṉap piramāṇa icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya
nāyaṉār koyil āticaṇṭe

inscription.head:
No. 338.
(A.R. No. 63 of 1903).
ON THE SAME WALL.

l.ta:
maiyum cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa coti
nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷa[nāṭṭu uṭai]yār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya-

teva[kaṉ]mikaḷukku vaṭaka[rai] rā[ca*]rā[ca*]vaḷa-
nāṭṭup pācciṟkūṟṟattuk kiḻpalāṟṟuk kuṟaippaṟṟu icaṇaikkuṟai ūravarom
puṉcey nila vilaiypiramāṇa icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu [|*] icaṇai-

kkuṟait talaikkuṟaiyil nāṅkaḷ viṟkiṉ[ṟa] nilaṅkaḷukku [icainta nāṟ]pāṟkellai
malaiyāḷaril kotaiyk koṇṭanampiceṭṭiyār nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ-
kellai ciṟṟāṟṟu niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai

kaṭampaṅkuṭaiyāṉ iniyāṉ peṟṟāṉ nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaṭa-
vāṟṟu niroṭukālukkut teṟkum āka icainta innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa
taṭi [n]ālināl nilam

ṭṭu mitupoy pūvaṇamuṭ[ai]yāṉ taṭinila[ttu]kku icainta [vaṭapā]ṟkellai
koṇṭanampiceṭṭiyār nilattukku meṟkum teṉpā[ṟ]kellai ciṟṟāṟṟu
niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai meṉāṭṭarayaṉ ṉilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭa-

pāṟkellai vaṭavāṟṟu niroṭukālukkut teṟkum āka icainta iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ
naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam

iṉṉi[la]m nālumāk kāṇiyum iṅkuviṭṭu mitupoy amaṇ-
kuṭaiy[ā]ṉ taṭinilattukkum [cū]r[ai]kkuṭai-

yāṉ taṭi nilattukkum kiḷiyaṉ tuṇaivaṉ taṭi nilattukkum icainta kiḻpāṟkellai
kaḻaṉivāyaluṭaiyāṉ uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku meṟku[m*] teṉpāṟkellai ciṟ-
ṟāṟṟu niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum [mi]pāṟkellai koṇṭanampiceṭ-

ṭiyār nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaṭavāṟṟu niroṭukālukku teṟkum āka
icainta innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa taṭi muṉṟiṉāl nilam

innilam
oṉṟe orumā [mu]kkāṇi araikkāṇiyum iṅkuviṭṭu mitupoy

kalattuṟ[ai mu]kkālukku icainta kiḻpāṟkellai āḻvār[c] cāttaṅkuṭaiyār
arintavaṉ [vi]ḻupparaiyar nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai ciṟṟāṟṟu
niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai kaḻaṉivāyaluṭaiyāṉ uḷḷiṭṭ[ā*]r
nilat-

tukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai [va]ṭavāṟṟu niroṭuk[ā*]lu[k]ku teṟkum āka
icainta iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam i innilam araiye araimā-
vum ākat taṭi oṉpatiṉāl nilam

ṇiyum iṟṟaināḷāl viṟṟukkuṭuttukoḷvatā[ṉa] emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ
aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu

ikkācu āṟāyirattu irunūṟṟorupattumuṉṟum
āvaṇakkaḷariye k[ā]ṭṭeṟ[ṟi]k kaiccelavaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai-

tevar kaṉmikaḷukku icaṇaik-
kuṟai ū[ra*]varom [|*] innilam muṉṟeiraṇṭumā araikkāṇikkum ikkācu
āṟāyirat tirunūṟ ṟorupattumuṉṟume vilaiyāvatākavum [|*] ituve

inscription.head:
No. 339.
(A.R. No. 64 of 1903).
ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

l.ta:
ṟa coti nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvu
ṭaiya nāyaṉār koyili[l*] āti

kku vaṭakarai rā[ca*]rā[ca*]vaḷanāṭṭup pācciṟkūṟṟattu kiḻpalāṟṟuk kuṟaippaṟṟu
icaṇaikkuṟaik kāṇiuṭaiya kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ a-
ṉumaṉamuṭaiyāṉum ivaṉ tampi nampiyum ivviruvom puṉcey nila vilai-

kkuṟait talaikkuṟaiyil nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭukkiṉṟa nilattukku icai[n]ta kiḻpāṟ-
kellai ūṟpotu talattuṟai mukkālnilattu-

kku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai ciṟ[ṟāṟ]ṟu niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai
ūṟpotu amaṇkuṭaiyāṉ taṭinila[t]-

[tu]kku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaṭavāṟṟu niroṭukālukkut te[ṟ]kkum āka
iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa ta[ṭi nilam]

pa innilam oṉṟe iraṇṭumā mun(ā)tirikaiyum iṟṟaiṉā-
ḷāl viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa emmi-

ikkācu iraṇṭāyirattu iru-
nūṟṟāṟum āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik

vā[yi]luṭaiyāṉ aṉumaṉamuṭaiyāṉum ivaṉ tampi nampiyum ivviruvom [|*]
iṉṉilam oṉṟe iraṇṭumā muntirikaikkum

ikkācu iraṇṭāyirattu i[ru]nūṟ ṟāṟume vilaiyāvutākavum [|*] ituve
poru[ḷ*]māvaṟutip poruṭcelav[o]lai yāvutākavum i-

tuvallatu ve[ṟu] porumāvaṟuti poruṭcela[v]olai kāṭṭakkaṭava tallātatāka-
vum [|*] iṉṉilattu meṉokkiṉa maramug

kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟukaḷu[m*] maṉaikaḷum po[tu]vum potāriyum maṟṟum epper-
paṭṭa urimaikaḷum akappaṭa mikutikkuṟai vu-
ḷḷaṭaṅka nilam oṉṟe iraṇṭumā muntirikaikkum i[varkaḷ ve]ṇ[ṭiṉa]pote

tākavum [|*]
ippaṭi cammatittu vilaik kaṟa viṟṟup poru ḷaṟakko-

māṇa icaivutiṭṭu kuṭuttom uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvu-
ṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil āti

va kaṉmikaḷukku kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ aṉumaṉamuṭaiyāṉum ivaṉ tampi nampiyum
ivviruvom [|*] ippaṭikku ivai kaḻaṉi-

ai āṉamaikku ivvūr ū[r]kaṇakku
va[ṭa]kuṭaiyāṉ kaṇakku koṭṭuṭaiyā

inscription.head:
No. 340.
(A.R. No. 65 of 1903).
ON THE SAME WALL.

l.ta:
yum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa attattu
nāḷ pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil
āticaṇṭe

vaḷanāṭṭup pācciṟkūṟṟattu kiḻpalāṟṟuk kāricāttaṉkuṟaik kāṇiuṭaiya oṭa-
muṭaiyāril kūttaṉ kuṉṟaṉāṉa kiḻāṟṟūr arayaṉum ivaṉ tampi ārampūṇṭā-
ṉum ivaṉ tampi tāḻi[yu]m viṭaṅkaṉ uṭaiyāṉāṉa maḻanāṭṭu viḻupparayanāṭāḻ-
vāṉu-

m ivaṉ tampi tiruvaraṅkaṉum perāyiramuṭaiyāṉ uyyāṉum ivvaṉaivom nila-
vilai

ṇa icaivutiṭṭu(k) kāricāttaṉkuṟaiyil iṟṟaināḷāl viṟṟukku-
ṭutta nilamum maṉaiyumāvatu [|*] kāricāttaṉkuṟaikku icainta kiḻpāṟkellai
icaṇaik kuṟai [e]-

llaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai innāyaṉār tevatāṉan tirunāmattukkāṇi
apputikkuṟaikku vaṭakkum ciṟṟāṟṟukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai apputikuṟai
ellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai āṟṟil niroṭukālukkut teṟkum āka
icain-

ta innāṉkellai yuḷpaṭṭa nilattāl paṅku panniraṇṭil pollātāṉ celvanāṉa
poṉṉimaḻaināṭāḻvāṉum uṭaiyāṉ nañcuṇṭāṉāṉa neṟkuppai ara[ya]-
ṉum uḷḷiṭṭār paṅkāy muṉṉāḷil innāyaṉār civanāmattāl vilaikoṇṭa
paṅku nālum maṇiya-

ṉ tevaṉāṉa [nā]ṟaivaḻi coḻappallavaraiyaṉum periyāṉ ampalavaṉāṉa
poṉmalai nāṭāḻvāṉum uḷḷiṭṭār paṅku nālum ākap paṅku eṭṭum nikki
eṅkaḷutāṉa paṅku

ippaṅku nālil ivvūril aiyyanār kuṉṟavaḷanāṭark-
kuc cikoyilun tirumuṟṟa-

edition.p:
1 Below the inscription is given the representation of the measuring-rod called muḻakkol which is
equivalent to 2 feet 6 inches in length. This is divided into four equal sections, one such section being
further subdivided into six equal parts, measuring nearly 1(1/4)" each.

••• ṭu innāḷmutal tirunāvukkaracu nāḻiyāl nāḷ oṉṟukku nā-
•• ciyug kaṟiyamutu viñcaṉamum tiruviḷakkum cāttuppaṭiyum ka-
ṭaiy(ā) nāya[ṉā]r koyil tevaka[ṉ]mi cimākecurak kaṇkāṇi cikāriyañ-
kāṇi kūttapperumāḷ eḻuttu [|*] ippaṭikku periyatirukkūṭṭa piramā-
tarāyaṉ eḻuttu [|*] ippaṭikku cikāriyam tirucciṟṟampalap pallavatarai-
yaṉ eḻuttu [|*] ippaṭikku māṭāpattiyam tirumalaiyuṭaiyāṉ eḻuttu [|*]

(A.R. Nos. 159 and 160 of 1903).
ON THE NORTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

nila[m*] muṉṟe nālu[mā]

edition.p:
The stones containing lines 13 to 18 are not in order. The inscription has been read here in
proper sequence.
edition.l:
āka nirnilamug karuñceyum uṭpaṭa nilam muṉṟe mukkāle muṉṟumā varaikkāṇi
muntirikaik kiḻmukkālum vaṇṭuvarāpatinampi koṇṭiṭṭa nilam oṉṟum eg-
kaḷ kārāṇmai uṭpaṭa prasāda ñceytaruḷiṉa tirumukattiṉpaṭiyile puravi-
lum piṟittukkuṭuttom [|*] inniyohattiṉ[ paṭi ca] ndrāditya vaṟ celvatāka
nāṉkellaikaḷilum ittaṭippaṭa tiruvāḻikkallu nāṭṭi[k] kallilum cempilum
veṭṭikkoḷka:—ivai iṟaivāṉaraiyūr colaippirāṉ p[e]riyanampiyāṉa
avaṉinārāyaṇa brahmā tarāyaṉ [|*] eḻuttu ivai puṇṭa[va]rddha nattu bṛha-
spati savaiyāji kecavaṉāṉa civakalliyāṇa[nam]-

pāṇṭiya

tarāyaṉ eḻuttu [|*] ivai

poṟkoyilnampi eḻuttu [|*] ivai ci[pu]ṇṭava

ṉāṉa teṉṉavaṉ piramātarāya[ṉ eḻu*]ttu [|*] ivai m[ā*]rāyamaṅkalattu kūt-
taṉ

rāyaṉ eḻuttu [|*] ivai cipokalūr poṉṉampi poliñcuniṉṟāṉāṉa ā[ka]-
varā[ma]nampi [e]ḻuttu [|*] ivai m[ā*]rācamaṅkalattu maṇavāḷaṉ mātavaṉāṉa
mayileṟumperumāḷnampi eḻuttu [|*] ivai m[ā*]rāca[maṅka]lattu cuvāminampi
colaippirāṉāṉa aruḷāḷapperumāḷnam[pi eḻu]ttu [|*] ivai m[ā*]rāyamaṅka-
lattu irāmatevaṉ mātavaṉāṉa tiruvāta[vū*]rnampi eḻuttu [|*] ivai cipoka-
lūr kūttaṉ naṅkaiyāḻvāṉāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyiranampi eḻuttu [|*]:—ivai
cipokalūr kaḷḷappirāṉ tiruppūvaṉamuṭ

ṣottamaṉ citaraṉāṉa aḻaki[ya]maṇavāḷanampi eḻuttu ivai cipokalūr māta-
vaṉ kūttaṉāṉa tillaimuvāyiranampi eḻuttu [|*] ivai m[ā*]rājamaṅkalattu āṭ-
koṇṭāṉ centilāṉa viṟṟiruntaperumāḷnampi eḻuttu—ivai cipokalūr
tiruvikkiramaṉ cikayilāsamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tiruuṇṇāḻiynampi e[ḻuttu] [|*] ivai
m[ā*]rājamaṅkalattu tiruvaraṅkapperumāḷ tāmotaraṉāṉa tirumāliruñcolai-
nampi eḻuttu:—ivai śrīpokalūr aṉa[n]tacayaṉaṉ peri[ya]ṉampiyāṉa tiru-
vārurnampi eḻuttu [|*] ivai cipuṇṭavattaṉattu aḻakaṉ [p]āṇṭiyā••
pāṇṭiya piramātarāyaṉ eḻuttu:—

tiravviyag vilaittiravviyamum• ta

edition.l:
••••• m āvaṇakkaḷiye kiḻikaic celakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai-
yāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom ūrkiḻān rājarāja n jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻanāna sē-
nāpatikaḷ irukkuveḷārkku paravaipurattu nakarattom [|*] innilattukku nirk
kiyntavaṇṇam nirpāccikkoḷḷap peṟuvatākavum [|*]

l.ta:
••••• cca peṟātomākavum [|*] cantirātittavaṟ•••
koḷḷap peṟuvatākavum [|*] innilattāl vanta iṟai iṟuttukkuṭuttu in-
nilam uḻuvāraiyum•• āṟṟukkāl veṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷ cilliṟai ceṉ
•• uḷḷiṭṭu eppeṟpaṭṭitum kāṭṭakkaṭavo mallātomākavum [|*] inta
tanma nokkivanta veṟṟa••

ntu koḷḷakkaṭava vilaittiravviyamum iṟaittiravviyamum āvaṇakkaḷiye kiḻi kaic-
celak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom

ṉāpatikaḷ irukku-
